productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boys Authentic Red Shirt
description: Style Note Your little guy will love the soft comfort of this cotton shirt from Gini & Jony while you'll love how smart he looks. Fuss-free dressing doesn't get better than this! Product Details Red and white checked shirt, has short sleeves, patch pockets on the chest and a curved hem Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery
